violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Found bucket at 10ppm CL, needs to be 100ppm CL
Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Refrigerator in unit found at 50F

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. - Not in use at time of inspection, Staff was washing dishes.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
